title: How to Read the Arcium Atlas
summary: A short guide to the structure of the site, what each section is for, and how to move from high-level orientation into technical context without getting lost in the vocabulary.

bodySections.title: Start broad, then narrow
bodySections.body: The homepage and About page establish the framing. They explain what Arcium is, why confidential compute matters, and how the rest of the atlas is organized.

bodySections.title: Use the glossary aggressively
bodySections.body: Arcium terminology gets dense quickly. The glossary is designed to be part of the reading flow, not a separate destination you only visit once.

bodySections.title: Pair categories with examples
bodySections.body: Whenever a concept starts to feel abstract, move into the ecosystem directory. Seeing how a term maps to an actual product category is often the fastest way to make the concept stick.
